title: Cyrtochilum grandiflorum
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum grandiflorum is a type of orchid. Cyrtochilum grandiflorum belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Cyrtochilum. Cyrtochilum grandiflorum is native to South America and is a terrestrial orchid species. The classification of Cyrtochilum grandiflorum places it in the subtribe Maxillariinae within the Orchidaceae family. Cyrtochilum grandiflorum is further classified into the tribe Orchideae.

Traditionally, Cyrtochilum grandiflorum is used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress.
